26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @Jessy255 made all of these. Fantastic work, as always. Check out their other posts for more!
27 Man Tax: Jules Pelissier
“The only sure weapon against bad ideas is better ideas.” - Alfred Whitney Griswold So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me **I'm 28 points from 1 million!! Thanks. You guys are the best!
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

Has Trump ever said a positive insightful quote showing deep understanding and intelligent application of knowledge?
This quote and all of his incalculable other quotes are perceived to be thoughtless and moronic. They all lack wisdom, and are heedless.

item.title: Fox News, just yesterday, dismissed the idea of Social Murder
item.description: Social murder (German: sozialer Mord) is a concept used to describe an unnatural death that is believed to occur due to social, political, or economic oppression, instead of direct violence. Originally coined in 1845 by German philosopher Friedrich Engels.

item.title: Pondering the orb
item.description:
October 15, 2021, Twitter user thatsgoodweb wrote "pondering my orb" to a picture of a sage with a crystal ball. It conjured a new meme, but what about the art?
It first appeared on the cover of A Spy In Isengard (1988) by US author Terry Kevin Amthor (1958 - 2021). The paperback book is a solo adventure game in the Middle-earth Quest series that was published by Iron Crown Enterprises.
The artist was Angus McBride (1931 - 2007) from Scotland. He is known for historical as well as fictional art and illustrated many Iron Crown Enterprises publications. The cover to A Spy In Isengar shows Saruman looking into his Palantir while a young man observes him, in accordance with two lines on the back of the book;
“You have seen Saruman poised over the great seeing stone exulting over scenes of battle. Has Saruman surrendered his will to the evil Sauron, Lord of the Rings?” Iron Crown Enterprises included the artwork in Angus McBride's Characters of Middle-earth (1990), a supplement book to the game Middle-earth Role Playing [MERP].
It was used again as cover to Valar & Maiar (1993), a supplement to MERP and to Lord of the Rings Adventure Game, and finally reused for the Saruman card in the Middle-Earth: The Wizards (1995) set to the Middle-earth Collectible Card Game.
At end, the 2021 tweet was soon reimagined by countless folks in various ways...
7
8
9
10
11
12
13
14
— — — — — INDEX: character bios https://imgur.com/gallery/axV2mPF INDEX: folks, animals, items, etc https://imgur.com/gallery/AQK9pJL

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
This looks a LOT like my sweet boy, Franklin. He's never solved any crimes, but he also has never been assigned to a case sooo...
One of my favorites
Get on the floor and do the dinosaur!
Praying to the old gods and the new today. I woke up at 3 am for the third time this week and couldn't go back to sleep. It's not important why, but the issue is going to fly itself back home tomorrow. Be excellent to each other.
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.title: TGIF memes
item.description: Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: Another Random Buffoonery Dumpy Doo
item.description:
That's not supposed to be in there...
Because reasons
But it's a lot sneakier
LEARN TO TELL TIME, DOC
"let's see, that piece goes there, that one goes there... then it can do that..."
Yo CJ, good to have you back man
What sorcery created this monster machine that can run so many tabs??
all my Is are crossed and my Ts are dotted
They're going for chicken tendies afterwards, wanna come?
Get more exercise
That's no toaster
I think the majority of things I embarrass myself (and others) is the tendency to "police" the situation if I see something not going how it's supposed to be. Example: I went off on the McDonald's manager once because they were all out of the Happy Meal toys, didn't say anything at all (no "sold out" sign or anything), and my kids got some stupid cardboard crap instead of the cool toy. IT WASN'T FAIR TO MY KIDS.
SuperSoakers™ filled with Holy Water
Sir, this is a Wendy's
"Thank you for your honesty... we're gonna have to let you go."
CORBIN, M'MAN, I GOT NO FIRE, I GOT NO MATCHES
He's watching you, and he likes what he sees
Snap back to reality
Hang on, let me check my phone.
Stupid grocery store lighting
Just trying to relate.
Is Iran funny??
WE CAN'T STOP HERE! THIS IS BORG COUNTRY!
I'm here to piddle around and chew bubble gum. And I'm all out of gum.
Maybe he's part snail, ever think of that? No, because you only think of yourself.
Oh, hey Marshmallow
item.dc:creator: ddubya42

item.title: The MAGA Gravy Train Is Headed Straight Off A Cliff. Ted Lieu Would Like To Help It Get There Faster.
item.description: Congressman Ted Lieu just announced a future Democratic administration will prosecute the Trump family for raking in money illegally. $9 BILLION in personal profit during his presidency. Eric Trump publicly boasting about a robotics company he works for that just got a $24 million Pentagon contract. This is not subtle. The BBC investigated and found a consistent pattern of market spikes hours or minutes BEFORE Trump makes major announcements. Every time he posts something geopolitically significant on Truth Social, suspiciously timed trades appear in the lead-up. Only someone with advance knowledge could do that. ONLY INSIDERS. He has turned the White House into a casino where he controls the deck. Crypto pump and dump schemes. Sweetheart Pentagon deals for his kids. Market manipulation via Truth Social posts. $9 billion in personal profit. The gravy train has its own Secret Service detail and a Mar-a-Lago membership. Lieu is right. Voting them out isn't enough. Every single one needs convictions and imprisonment. Because anything less gives the next aspiring crime family a fucking instruction manual. The MAGA gravy train is headed straight off a cliff. Let's make sure it takes them with it. ⚖️ #TedLieu #TrumpCrimefamily #InsiderTrading #PentagonContracts #MarketManipulation #$9Billion #ProsecuteThem #MAGAGravyTrain #WhiteHouseCasino #LockThemUp
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: The girls have decided Persey will replace the human
